turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hi! I’d like to schedule a check-up, if possible.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, just to confirm, are you looking for an appointment next week in the mornings?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Awesome. Can you tell me something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it— what time in the morning works best for you?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'm looking for an appointment three days from now.
